positive: A whimsical scene of a group of tiny, anthropomorphic forest spirits (gnomes and dryads) having a picnic in a glowing, overgrown mushroom forest. Soft pastel color palette, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, volumetric lighting, highly detailed digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, harsh colors, industrial, photorealistic
